zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie Valdemarsdatter於1159年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen28歲，母親Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark18歲。她於1181年與Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她於1159年住在丹麥洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德。她去世於1208年2月12日享年49歲，埋葬在德國賀爾左圖姆 薩辛-阿爾波格奧拉姆爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie Valdemarsdatter于1159年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen28岁，母亲Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark18岁。她于1181年与Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她于1159年住在丹麦洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德。她去世于1208年2月12日享年49岁，埋葬在德国賀爾左圖姆 薩辛-阿爾波格奧拉姆爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Sophie

meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie Valdemarsdatter was born in 1159, in Roskilde, Denmark, her father, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, was 28 and her mother, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, was 18. She married Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III in 1181, in Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She lived in Roskilde, Roskilde, Denmark in 1159. She died on 12 February 1208, at the age of 49, and was buried in Orlamünde, Saxe-Altenburg, Germany.

fr.Biburg, Augsburg: Biburg, Diedorf, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie Valdemarsdatter est née en 1159, à Roskilde, Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III en 1181, à Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle a vécu à Roskilde, Roskilde, Danemark en 1159. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1208, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Orlamünde, Herzogtum Sachsen-Altenburg, Allemagne.

de.Biburg, Augsburg: Biburg, Diedorf, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie Valdemarsdatter 1159 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen 28 und ihre Mutter Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark 18. Sie hat 1181 in Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1159 hat sie in Roskilde, Roskilde, Dänemark gelebt. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1208 im Alter von 49 Jahren und wurde in Orlamünde, Herzogtum Sachsen-Altenburg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Valdemarsdatter è nata il nel 1159 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, sua padre, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III nel 1181, nel Schleswig-Holstein, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Vissuto a Roskilde, Roskilde, Danimarca nel 1159. Morì il 12 febbraio 1208, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Orlamünde, Herzogtum Sachsen-Altenburg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie Valdemarsdatterが1159年にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた時，父Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsenは28歳，母Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmarkは18歳であった。1181年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインでSiegfried von Weimar Orlamünde IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1159年にはデンマークロスキルドロスキルドに住んでいた。彼女は1208年2月12日に49歳で死去し，ドイツハーゾグトゥム サチセン-アルテンブルグオルラムuンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Biburg, Augsburg: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그 디도르프 비버그
ko.lifeSummary: Sophie Valdemarsdatter(이)가 1159년 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1181년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인에서 Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1159년도에 덴마크 로스킬드 로스킬드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1208년 2월 12일 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 허초그투 작센-알텐버그 올를램u드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Valdemarsdatter nasceu em 1159, em Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III em 1181, em Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela viveu em Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca em 1159. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1208, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Orlamünde, Herzogtum Sachsen-Altenburg, Alemanha.

ru.Biburg, Augsburg: бибург, диедорф, ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie Valdemarsdatter родилась в 1159 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, её отцу по имени Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III в 1181 г. в местности щлесвиг-холстин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она жила в местности роскаилд, роскаилд, Дания в 1159 году. Она умерла 12 февраля 1208 г. в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности орлэмuнд, хирзогтум сачсен-алтенбург, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie Valdemarsdatter nació en 1159, en Roskilde, Dinamarca, su papá, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III en 1181, en Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Vivió en Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca en 1159. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1208, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Orlamünde, Herzogtum Sachsen-Altenburg, Alemania.
